title: primula squarrosula
intro: Primula squarrosula, also known as the hairy-leaved primrose or squarrose primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating skin conditions, due to its active compounds and flavonoids. Primula squarrosula can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used to promote digestive health and alleviate respiratory issues.
